summary: A solid mid‑90s show with a strong performance and an archived recording that fans consider one of the better ones available.
review: Reviewers describe this 1994 concert as a very good show, highlighting its overall quality for that era. The recording is praised as “the best… yet archived,” suggesting a clear and listenable source despite the lack of detailed technical notes. While specific song moments aren’t called out, the consensus points to an enjoyable listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Single positive 4‑star review indicating both a good performance and a well‑received recording; limited data keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit technical details provided; reviewer calls it the best archived recording, implying clear and satisfactory sound quality.

show_quality.setlist_flow: General praise for the overall show without specific comments on pacing or set structure.
